title: Shared Memory, Mutexes, Atomics, the Memory Model, and Race Evidence · Execution Trace: Data Races Happens Before
summary: Concurrent workers update shared counters, caches, and snapshots; plausible output hides races and broken publication. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go data races happens before increment in a race-free shared-state component. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Identify conflicting memory operations and establish sequenced-before, synchronized-before, and happens-before evidence.
Detect leaked goroutines with ownership traces, cancellation tests, profiles, and changed failure cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
